overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage walking through a cyberpunk city mixing traditional Asian architecture with futuristic megastructures. The scene transitions from an indoor neon-lit shop to hazy outdoor streets with elevated highways and a prominent circular building, showcasing dense urban atmosphere with wet pavement reflections and orange-tinted smog.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a narrow shop with green neon lighting and traditional Asian decor. A character in a wide-brimmed hat stands near wooden shelves holding a drink. The camera moves forward and exits through a doorway, leaving the shop interior behind.

segments.scene_description: Moving from the shop into a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, the scene features steam vents and neon-lit vending machines. The lighting shifts from artificial green to mixed natural and shadow as the camera progresses along the concrete sidewalk, passing a pedestrian in a red coat.

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open city street with wet pavement reflecting the neon lights, the camera approaches a large intersection. A massive circular megastructure becomes visible in the distance, while a skyscraper with a 77 logo dominates the left side. Vehicles drive past as the traffic light changes to green.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with megastructures and elevated highways

events.description: enters the wide intersection crossing toward the circular megastructure
looks upward to view the elevated highway ramps and circular building against sky

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while looking up at the massive circular megastructure and elevated highway ramps overhead

notable_agents.action: person in dark coat crossing the street in same direction toward the megastructure

entered.detail: elevated walkway crossing above the street with silhouetted people visible
industrial smoke stacks emitting orange-tinted smoke into the hazy sky
massive curved elevated highway structure arching overhead

segments.scene_description: Crossing a wide urban intersection, the scene opens up to reveal the massive circular megastructure dominating the center view. Elevated highway ramps curve overhead while orange smoke rises from industrial stacks in the distance. The camera looks upward to take in the scale of the architecture before continuing across the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with traditional Asian market stalls

events.description: enters covered walkway with traditional wooden structures and red paper lanterns

large vertical pink neon advertisement sign on building facade

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered pedestrian walkway with traditional Asian architecture, the scene features wooden gates with red paper lanterns and market stalls lining the path. The circular megastructure fades from view as the camera moves deeper into this more intimate urban space, passing pedestrians and neon-lit storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate, neon-lit interior of a traditional shop into a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape before settling into a crowded pedestrian market. It begins inside a narrow shop bathed in green neon light, moving past a character in a wide-brimmed hat and exiting through a doorway. As the camera progresses, the scene shifts from the shop's interior to a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, passing steam vents and vending machines before emerging onto a wide city street with wet, reflective pavement. The view then expands at a massive intersection, where a towering skyscraper and a distant circular megastructure dominate the skyline amidst orange industrial smoke and flowing traffic. Finally, the camera crosses the road and enters a covered walkway adorned with red paper lanterns and wooden gates, moving away from the megastructures and deeper into a dense corridor of market stalls and neon storefronts.
